columns.description: Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.
Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.
Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.
Open date as YYYYMMDD int. DWH-computed from OpenOccurred. Indexed.
Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.
UTC timestamp when position was opened. Maps to Occurred in production Trade.PositionTbl.
UTC timestamp when close was written. 1900-01-01 for open positions.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).
Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Position size in units of the underlying instrument (shares, crypto units, forex lots). Updated on partial close. Used in PnL and hedge exposure.
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).
eToro markup (additional spread on top of market spread) at open in USD. Synonym: markup. Manifests as AskSpreaded/BidSpreaded minus Ask/Bid.
Instrument exchange rate at open. Core PnL input: (CloseRate - InitForexRate) × Units × ConversionRate.
Bid-side spread rate at open (instrument bid after spread mark-up). Used in PnL and hedge calculations.
Ask-side spread rate at open (instrument ask after spread mark-up). Used in PnL and hedge calculations.
Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.
Customer invested amount in USD. Updated proportionally on partial close. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Position size in units of the underlying instrument (shares, crypto units, forex lots). Updated on partial close. Used in PnL and hedge exposure.
Take-profit rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves favorably.
Stop-loss rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves against.
Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Authoritative settlement: 0=CFD,1=REAL,2=TRS,3=CMT(Crypto settled),4=REAL_FUTURES,5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL=legacy, use ISNULL(SettlementTypeID,CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Estimated close fee for CFD positions. From Trade.OpenPositionEndOfDay.
Estimated close fee at open, per unit.
Estimated close fee recorded at open.
Same as PnLInDollars but based on closing price instead of last (current) price.
Instrument rate used to compute Close_PnLInDollars (closing-price-based PnL, vs last-price-based PnLInDollars).
Currency conversion rate for Close_PnLInDollars. Converts instrument currency to USD using closing price snapshot.
Closing price source for Close_PnLInDollars. 2=63.5%,1=11.8%,0=6.6%,3=0.05%,NULL=18%. Sources: official close, unofficial close, dealer injection, last internal price. Value-to-source mapping TBD.
Current calculation rate for open position PnL (end-of-day snapshot).
Current conversion rate for open position PnL (end-of-day snapshot).

Hedge participation: 1=included in hedge exposure (default), 0=excluded (PlayerLevelID=4 customers).
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Close volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) at close. Same formula as Volume but at close-time values. Pro-rated for partial close.
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
eToro markup (additional spread) at close. May be adjusted by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen for reopened positions.
Full spread at close = market spread + eToro markup. May be adjusted for reopened positions.
Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).
Airdrop flag: 1=eToro opened position on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations — not just crypto). Set from Trade.PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not airdrop.
Authoritative settlement: 0=CFD,1=REAL,2=TRS,3=CMT(Crypto settled),4=REAL_FUTURES,5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL=legacy, use ISNULL(SettlementTypeID,CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).

Full spread at open = market spread (variable spread, Ask-Bid) + eToro markup (Commission). Total spread cost to customer.
Airdrop flag: 1=eToro opened position on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations — not just crypto). Set from Trade.PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not airdrop.
[UNVERIFIED] Platform type. Not populated — always NULL in this table.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Customer invested amount in USD. Updated proportionally on partial close. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.

Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.
Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).
eToro markup (additional spread) at close. May be adjusted by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen for reopened positions.
Full spread at open = market spread (variable spread, Ask-Bid) + eToro markup (Commission). Total spread cost to customer.
Full spread at close = market spread + eToro markup. May be adjusted for reopened positions.
Crypto redemption transaction record reference. NULL when RedeemStatus=0.
Crypto redemption status — tracks position to crypto-in-wallet loop: 0=N/A,1=Pending,6=PositionClosed(redeem),20=Terminated,21=FailedToCancel. Refs Dim_RedeemStatus.

Regulation at open. DWH-joined from BackOfficeCustomer. 0=None,1=CySEC,2=FCA,3=eToroUS,4=ASIC,5=BVI,6=FinCEN,7=FINRAONLY,8=MAS,9=FSA Seychelles,10=ASIC&GAML,11=FSRA,12=NYDFS+FINRA. Refs Dim_Regulation.
For reopened positions: references the original closed PositionID this position replaces.
Reopen flag: 1=created by reopening a previously closed position (e.g., after corporate action). Default 0.
Original CommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen.
Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment.
For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID ≠ PositionID → partial-close child.
Flag: 1=has had partial-close children created. Set by SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent.
Flag: 1=created by partial close. ALWAYS filter ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0 when counting positions.
Original unit count at open, preserved before partial-close adjustments. AmountInUnitsDecimal changes; InitialUnits does not.
Discounted pricing from Trade.PositionTreeInfo: 0=standard Bid/Ask, 1=BidDiscounted/AskDiscounted (VIP/partner).
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
eToro markup prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*Commission. Adjusts for partial closes.
Full spread prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*FullCommission. Adjusts for partial closes.
Airdrop flag: 1=eToro opened position on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations — not just crypto). Set from Trade.PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not airdrop.
Authoritative settlement: 0=CFD,1=REAL,2=TRS,3=CMT(Crypto settled),4=REAL_FUTURES,5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL=legacy, use ISNULL(SettlementTypeID,CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
DLT broker flag at open: 1=opened on DLT platform (German crypto broker for trade execution), 0/NULL=not DLT.
DLT broker flag at close: 1=closed on DLT platform (German crypto broker), 0/NULL=not DLT.
eToro open markup prorated by units: OpenMarkup * AmountInUnitsDecimal / InitialUnits. Adjusts for partial closes.
Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).

Commission calculation version. Different values represent different versions/models of how commission is computed.
Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.
Open date as YYYYMMDD int. DWH-computed from OpenOccurred. Indexed.
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Financial instrument being traded (stock, forex, crypto, ETF, commodity, index). References Dim_Instrument. Drives settlement rules, fees, hedge routing, PnL conversion.
Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.

Trade direction: 1=Buy/Long (profits if price rises), 0=Sell/Short (profits if price falls).
Initial order that triggered this open (for order-driven opens). NULL for direct opens.

Copy-trade relationship: 0=manually opened, >0=auto-opened via CopyTrader (references Trade.Mirror.MirrorID).
Copy-trade: direct parent PositionID. Sentinel 1 = independent/no parent.
Customer invested amount in USD. Updated proportionally on partial close. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Leverage multiplier (e.g., 1=no leverage/real ownership, 5=5x). Leverage=1 + IsSettled=1 → REAL settlement. Gross notional = Amount × Leverage.
Initial order that triggered this open (for order-driven opens). NULL for direct opens.
Closed PnL in USD. Zero while open. Set at close: ROUND(@NetProfit / 100, 2).
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Original unit count at open, preserved before partial-close adjustments. AmountInUnitsDecimal changes; InitialUnits does not.
Position size in units of the underlying instrument (shares, crypto units, forex lots). Updated on partial close. Used in PnL and hedge exposure.
Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.
UTC timestamp when position was opened. Maps to Occurred in production Trade.PositionTbl.
Instrument exchange rate at open. Core PnL input: (CloseRate - InitForexRate) × Units × ConversionRate.
Margin requirement per unit at open, in account currency. Used for margin calcs, risk checks, regulatory reporting.
Stop-loss rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves against.
Flag: 1=has had partial-close children created. Set by SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent.
Flag: 1=created by partial close. ALWAYS filter ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0 when counting positions.
Original amount in cents at open. NEVER updated. Divide by 100 for USD: InitialAmountCents/100. Denominator for partial-close proportional calcs.
Cumulative end-of-week holding fee in USD. Updated weekly. Reduced on partial close.
Instrument exchange rate at close. NULL for open positions. Used in NetProfit calculation.
Bid with spread at close from forex price snapshot.
UTC timestamp when close was written. 1900-01-01 for open positions.

eToro markup (additional spread) at close. May be adjusted by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen for reopened positions.
UTC timestamp when position was opened. Maps to Occurred in production Trade.PositionTbl.
UTC timestamp when close was written. 1900-01-01 for open positions.
Copy-trade: direct parent PositionID. Sentinel 1 = independent/no parent.
Original parent PositionID at copy time. Preserved even after tree restructuring. Sentinel 1 = independent.

OPEN_OPEN mechanism: 1=created by reinvesting unrealised profit (OpenActionType=3).
Open date as YYYYMMDD int. DWH-computed from OpenOccurred. Indexed.
Close date as YYYYMMDD int. 0=still open. Part of clustered index. Key filter for open vs closed.

Regulation at open. DWH-joined from BackOfficeCustomer. 0=None,1=CySEC,2=FCA,3=eToroUS,4=ASIC,5=BVI,6=FinCEN,7=FINRAONLY,8=MAS,9=FSA Seychelles,10=ASIC&GAML,11=FSRA,12=NYDFS+FINRA. Refs Dim_Regulation.
[UNVERIFIED] Platform type. Not populated — always NULL in this table.
[UNVERIFIED] Position segment. Not populated — always NULL in this table.
Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.
[UNVERIFIED] Open indicator flag. Mostly NULL; values 0 and 1 observed rarely.
Spread commission in pips (integer). Used in hedge calculation and spread-group reporting.
Instrument exchange rate at close. NULL for open positions. Used in NetProfit calculation.
Conversion rate from most recent overnight operation for non-USD instruments.
Take-profit rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves favorably.
Stop-loss rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves against.

Close reason. Refs Dim_ClosePositionReason: 0=Customer,1=StopLoss,5=TakeProfit,7=Rollover,8=BackOffice,9=Hierarchical,13=CopySL,14=ReturnToMarket,15=JoinDemoChallenge,17=ManualUnregister,19=Redeem,20=CloseAll,21=ManualLiquidation,23=Alignment,24=Delist,25=BSL,26=Expiry,27=OpAdjustment,28=Orphaned,29=TransferredOut.
Copy-trade tree root. Independent: TreeID=PositionID. Copy-trade: TreeID=leader PositionID. All positions sharing a TreeID share SL/TP settings.
Full spread at open = market spread (variable spread, Ask-Bid) + eToro markup (Commission). Total spread cost to customer.
Full spread at close = market spread + eToro markup. May be adjusted for reopened positions.
Hedge participation: 1=included in hedge exposure (default), 0=excluded (PlayerLevelID=4 customers).
Original amount in cents at open. NEVER updated. Divide by 100 for USD: InitialAmountCents/100. Denominator for partial-close proportional calcs.
Crypto redemption status — tracks position to crypto-in-wallet loop: 0=N/A,1=Pending,6=PositionClosed(redeem),20=Terminated,21=FailedToCancel. Refs Dim_RedeemStatus.
Crypto redemption transaction record reference. NULL when RedeemStatus=0.
For reopened positions: references the original closed PositionID this position replaces.
Reopen flag: 1=created by reopening a previously closed position (e.g., after corporate action). Default 0.
Original CommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen.
Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment.
For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID ≠ PositionID → partial-close child.
Flag: 1=has had partial-close children created. Set by SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent.
Flag: 1=created by partial close. ALWAYS filter ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0 when counting positions.
Original unit count at open, preserved before partial-close adjustments. AmountInUnitsDecimal changes; InitialUnits does not.
Flag: 1=partial close child of a reopened position. Set by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen.
Discounted pricing from Trade.PositionTreeInfo: 0=standard Bid/Ask, 1=BidDiscounted/AskDiscounted (VIP/partner).
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Close volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) at close. Same formula as Volume but at close-time values. Pro-rated for partial close.
eToro markup prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*Commission. Adjusts for partial closes.
Full spread prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*FullCommission. Adjusts for partial closes.
Flag: 1=belongs to CopyFund (tree root CID has AccountTypeID=9 OR MirrorTypeID=4 in Dim_Mirror). NULL=not copy fund.
Price-rate record from most recent overnight operation.
Airdrop flag: 1=eToro opened position on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations — not just crypto). Set from Trade.PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not airdrop.
Price-rate snapshot record at open. Enables exact rate lookup for audit/recalculation.
Price-rate snapshot at close.
Ask price from forex price snapshot at open. Joined from PriceLog via InitForexPriceRateID.
Bid price from forex price snapshot at open. Joined from PriceLog via InitForexPriceRateID.
Ask with spread at open from forex price snapshot.
Bid with spread at open from forex price snapshot.
USD conversion rate at open from forex price snapshot. Used for PnL conversion to USD.
Ask price from forex price snapshot at close.
Bid price from forex price snapshot at close.
Ask with spread at close from forex price snapshot.
Bid with spread at close from forex price snapshot.
USD conversion rate at close from forex price snapshot.
Execution record ID from exchange/LP at open. Used for reconciliation and to determine InitHedgeType (HBC vs CBH).
Execution record ID from exchange/LP at close. Used to determine EndHedgeType.
Conversion rate from instrument currency to account currency at open. Used in PnL currency conversion.
Conversion-rate snapshot record at open.
Market price-rate record at close.
Hedge model at open: CBH=Client-Based Hedging (~95%), HBC=Hedge Before Client (~5%). Determined from HBCExecutionLog.
Hedge model at close: CBH or HBC. NULL for open positions.
Initial order that triggered this open (for order-driven opens). NULL for direct opens.
Exit order ID for stop/limit-triggered closes. NULL for market/direct closes.
Settlement status at open time. May differ from IsSettled if converted after open. Use ISNULL(IsSettledOnOpen,IsSettled) for at-open segmentation.
Stop-loss rate at open time. May differ from current StopRate if modified after open.
Take-profit rate at open time. May differ from current LimitRate if modified after open.
Instrument price from most recent overnight operation. Starting rate for next overnight PnL calculation.
Authoritative settlement: 0=CFD,1=REAL,2=TRS,3=CMT(Crypto settled),4=REAL_FUTURES,5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL=legacy, use ISNULL(SettlementTypeID,CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Market price-rate record at open execution time.
Market ask price at open.
Market bid price at open.
Market ask with spread at open.
Market bid with spread at open.
Conversion rate (bid-spreaded) at open market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
Conversion rate (ask-spreaded) at open market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
Market ask with spread at close.
Market bid with spread at close.
Market ask price at close.
Market bid price at close.
Conversion rate (bid-spreaded) at close market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
Conversion rate (ask-spreaded) at close market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
UTC timestamp when open was requested. May differ from OpenOccurred if execution was delayed.
UTC timestamp when close was requested. Used for close latency measurement.
Order type at open. Refs Dictionary.OrderType. Common: NULL(66%),17(28%),0(4%),18/13(rare).
PnL formula version: 0=CFD_FORMULA, 1=REAL_FORMULA. NULL=legacy. Determines Trade.FnCalculatePnL code path.
Current unrealized PnL in dollars for open positions (end-of-day snapshot). From Trade.OpenPositionEndOfDay.
Market spread (variable spread) at open = Ask - Bid. The market-side spread before eToro markup is added.
Market spread (variable spread) at close = Ask - Bid.
eToro close-side markup pre-computed at open time. Locks in the close markup rate at entry.
eToro markup (additional spread) at open in USD. Same concept as Commission in spread terms.
eToro markup (additional spread) at close.
DLT broker flag at open: 1=opened on DLT platform (German crypto broker for trade execution), 0/NULL=not DLT.
DLT broker flag at close: 1=closed on DLT platform (German crypto broker), 0/NULL=not DLT.
eToro open markup prorated by units: OpenMarkup * AmountInUnitsDecimal / InitialUnits. Adjusts for partial closes.
Commission calculation version. Different values represent different versions/models of how commission is computed.
Exit order type for stop/limit-triggered closes. Values: 20=56%,NULL=44%,19=rare. NULL for customer/manual closes.
Open mechanism/reason. Refs Dictionary.OpenPositionActionType. Values 0-18 per dictionary. 2000-series values (2020-2023) are ETL data quality artefacts, not year codes.
Total taxes at open (e.g., UK stamp duty). Default 0.
Total taxes at close. NULL for open positions.
Total ticket fees at open — fixed $ or % of volume. More fees may be added later; full breakdown in History.Cost.
Total ticket fees at close — fixed $ or % of volume. More fees may accrue; full breakdown in History.Cost. NULL for open positions.
Estimated close fee for CFD positions. From Trade.OpenPositionEndOfDay.
Estimated close fee at open, per unit.
Estimated close fee recorded at open.
Same as PnLInDollars but based on closing price instead of last (current) price.
Instrument rate used to compute Close_PnLInDollars (closing-price-based PnL, vs last-price-based PnLInDollars).
Closing price source for Close_PnLInDollars. 2=63.5%,1=11.8%,0=6.6%,3=0.05%,NULL=18%. Sources: official close, unofficial close, dealer injection, last internal price. Value-to-source mapping TBD.
Current calculation rate for open position PnL (end-of-day snapshot).
Current conversion rate for open position PnL (end-of-day snapshot).
Currency conversion rate for Close_PnLInDollars. Converts instrument currency to USD using closing price snapshot.

Hedge participation: 1=included in hedge exposure (default), 0=excluded (PlayerLevelID=4 customers).
Original amount in cents at open. NEVER updated. Divide by 100 for USD: InitialAmountCents/100. Denominator for partial-close proportional calcs.
Crypto redemption status — tracks position to crypto-in-wallet loop: 0=N/A,1=Pending,6=PositionClosed(redeem),20=Terminated,21=FailedToCancel. Refs Dim_RedeemStatus.
Crypto redemption transaction record reference. NULL when RedeemStatus=0.
For reopened positions: references the original closed PositionID this position replaces.
Reopen flag: 1=created by reopening a previously closed position (e.g., after corporate action). Default 0.
Original CommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen.
Original FullCommissionOnClose before reopen adjustment.
For partial-close children: parent PositionID. When OriginalPositionID ≠ PositionID → partial-close child.
Flag: 1=has had partial-close children created. Set by SP_Dim_Position_IsPartialCloseParent.
Flag: 1=created by partial close. ALWAYS filter ISNULL(IsPartialCloseChild,0)=0 when counting positions.
Original unit count at open, preserved before partial-close adjustments. AmountInUnitsDecimal changes; InitialUnits does not.
Flag: 1=partial close child of a reopened position. Set by SP_Dim_Position_ReOpen.
Discounted pricing from Trade.PositionTreeInfo: 0=standard Bid/Ask, 1=BidDiscounted/AskDiscounted (VIP/partner).
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Close volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate) at close. Same formula as Volume but at close-time values. Pro-rated for partial close.
eToro markup prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*Commission. Adjusts for partial closes.
Full spread prorated by units: (AmountInUnitsDecimal/InitialUnits)*FullCommission. Adjusts for partial closes.
Flag: 1=belongs to CopyFund (tree root CID has AccountTypeID=9 OR MirrorTypeID=4 in Dim_Mirror). NULL=not copy fund.
Price-rate record from most recent overnight operation.
Airdrop flag: 1=eToro opened position on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations — not just crypto). Set from Trade.PositionAirdropLog. NULL=not airdrop.
Price-rate snapshot record at open. Enables exact rate lookup for audit/recalculation.
Price-rate snapshot at close.
Ask price from forex price snapshot at open. Joined from PriceLog via InitForexPriceRateID.
Bid price from forex price snapshot at open. Joined from PriceLog via InitForexPriceRateID.
Ask with spread at open from forex price snapshot.
Bid with spread at open from forex price snapshot.
USD conversion rate at open from forex price snapshot. Used for PnL conversion to USD.
Ask price from forex price snapshot at close.
Bid price from forex price snapshot at close.
Ask with spread at close from forex price snapshot.
Bid with spread at close from forex price snapshot.
USD conversion rate at close from forex price snapshot.
Execution record ID from exchange/LP at open. Used for reconciliation and to determine InitHedgeType (HBC vs CBH).
Execution record ID from exchange/LP at close. Used to determine EndHedgeType.
Conversion rate from instrument currency to account currency at open. Used in PnL currency conversion.
Conversion-rate snapshot record at open.
Market price-rate record at close.
Hedge model at open: CBH=Client-Based Hedging (~95%), HBC=Hedge Before Client (~5%). Determined from HBCExecutionLog.
Hedge model at close: CBH or HBC. NULL for open positions.
Initial order that triggered this open (for order-driven opens). NULL for direct opens.
Exit order ID for stop/limit-triggered closes. NULL for market/direct closes.
Settlement status at open time. May differ from IsSettled if converted after open. Use ISNULL(IsSettledOnOpen,IsSettled) for at-open segmentation.
Stop-loss rate at open time. May differ from current StopRate if modified after open.
Take-profit rate at open time. May differ from current LimitRate if modified after open.
Instrument price from most recent overnight operation. Starting rate for next overnight PnL calculation.
Authoritative settlement: 0=CFD,1=REAL,2=TRS,3=CMT(Crypto settled),4=REAL_FUTURES,5=MARGIN_TRADE. NULL=legacy, use ISNULL(SettlementTypeID,CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Market price-rate record at open execution time.
Market ask price at open.
Market bid price at open.
Market ask with spread at open.
Market bid with spread at open.
Conversion rate (bid-spreaded) at open market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
Conversion rate (ask-spreaded) at open market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
Market ask with spread at close.
Market bid with spread at close.
Market ask price at close.
Market bid price at close.
Conversion rate (bid-spreaded) at close market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
Conversion rate (ask-spreaded) at close market snapshot. Note: column name typo "Coversion".
UTC timestamp when open was requested. May differ from OpenOccurred if execution was delayed.
UTC timestamp when close was requested. Used for close latency measurement.
Order type at open. Refs Dictionary.OrderType. Common: NULL(66%),17(28%),0(4%),18/13(rare).

Close reason. Refs Dim_ClosePositionReason: 0=Customer,1=StopLoss,5=TakeProfit,7=Rollover,8=BackOffice,9=Hierarchical,13=CopySL,14=ReturnToMarket,15=JoinDemoChallenge,17=ManualUnregister,19=Redeem,20=CloseAll,21=ManualLiquidation,23=Alignment,24=Delist,25=BSL,26=Expiry,27=OpAdjustment,28=Orphaned,29=TransferredOut.
Unique position identifier. System-generated. Also serves as the root TreeID for independent (non-copy-trade) positions. HASH distribution key for this table.
Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.
Legacy real-ownership flag: 1=Real (owns shares), 0=CFD. Predates SettlementTypeID. Fallback: ISNULL(SettlementTypeID, CAST(IsSettled AS tinyint)).
Stop-loss rate from Trade.PositionTreeInfo. Price at which position auto-closes if market moves against.
Position size in standard lots. Updated on partial close. Used in overnight fee and hedge calculations.
